name: Grupo Televisa, S.A.B.
description: Grupo Televisa, S.A.B. is the largest media company in the Spanish-speaking world, headquartered in Mexico City, Mexico. Founded in 1955, the corporation operates as a major telecommunications entity, owning and managing significant cable networks and a leading direct-to-home satellite pay television system. Beyond its domestic dominance in Mexico, Televisa produces extensive Spanish-language audiovisual content, distributing its programs and formats to over 50 countries globally. The company remains a pivotal player in the international media landscape, bridging content production with advanced telecommunications infrastructure.
